Package com.destroystokyo.paper

Class MaterialTags

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.destroystokyo.paper.MaterialTags
  • public class MaterialTags
extends Object
    Represents a collection tags to identify materials that share common properties. Will map to minecraft for missing tags, as well as custom ones that may be useful.

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field Description
      static MaterialSetTag ARROWS  
      static MaterialSetTag BEDS
      Cover all 16 colors of beds.
      static MaterialSetTag BUCKETS
      Covers all bucket items.
      static MaterialSetTag COALS
      Covers coal and charcoal.
      static MaterialSetTag COBBLESTONE_WALLS
      Covers both cobblestone wall variants.
      static MaterialSetTag COBBLESTONES
      Covers both cobblestone and mossy Cobblestone.
      static MaterialSetTag COLORABLE  
      static MaterialSetTag CONCRETE_POWDER
      Covers all 16 colors of concrete powder.
      static MaterialSetTag CONCRETES
      Covers all 16 colors of concrete.
      static MaterialSetTag COOKED_FISH
      Covers the two types of cooked fish.
      static MaterialSetTag DYES
      Covers all 16 dyes.
      static MaterialSetTag FENCE_GATES
      Covers all 6 wood variants of gates.
      static MaterialSetTag FENCES
      Covers all 6 wood variants and nether brick fence.
      static MaterialSetTag FISH_BUCKETS
      Covers all 4 variants of fish buckets.
      static MaterialSetTag GLASS
      Covers the non-colored glass and 16 stained glass (not panes).
      static MaterialSetTag GLASS_PANES
      Covers the non-colored glass panes and 16 stained glass panes (panes only).
      static MaterialSetTag GLAZED_TERRACOTTA
      Covers all 16 glazed terracotta blocks.
      static MaterialSetTag GOLDEN_APPLES
      Covers both golden apples.
      static MaterialSetTag HORSE_ARMORS
      Covers the 3 variants of horse armor.
      static MaterialSetTag INFESTED_BLOCKS
      Covers the 6 variants of infested blocks.
      static MaterialSetTag MUSHROOM_BLOCKS
      Covers the 3 variants of mushroom blocks.
      static MaterialSetTag MUSHROOMS
      Covers both mushrooms.
      static MaterialSetTag MUSIC_DISCS
      Covers all 12 music disc items.
      static MaterialSetTag ORES
      Covers all 8 ores.
      static MaterialSetTag PISTONS
      Covers all piston typed items and blocks including the piston head and moving piston.
      static MaterialSetTag POTATOES
      Covers all potato items.
      static MaterialSetTag PRESSURE_PLATES
      Covers all 6 wooden pressure plates and the 2 weighted pressure plates and 1 stone pressure plate.
      static MaterialSetTag PRISMARINE
      Covers the 3 variants of prismarine blocks.
      static MaterialSetTag PRISMARINE_SLABS
      Covers the 3 variants of prismarine slabs.
      static MaterialSetTag PRISMARINE_STAIRS
      Covers the 3 variants of prismarine stairs.
      static MaterialSetTag PUMPKINS
      Covers the 3 variants of pumpkins.
      static MaterialSetTag PURPUR  
      static MaterialSetTag QUARTZ_BLOCKS
      Covers the 4 variants of quartz blocks.
      static MaterialSetTag RAW_FISH
      Covers all uncooked fish items.
      static MaterialSetTag RED_SANDSTONES
      Covers the 4 variants of red sandstone blocks.
      static MaterialSetTag REDSTONE_TORCH  
      static MaterialSetTag SANDSTONES
      Covers the 4 variants of sandstone blocks.
      static MaterialSetTag SHULKER_BOXES
      Covers the non-colored and 16 colored shulker boxes.
      static MaterialSetTag SIGNS  
      static MaterialSetTag SKULLS
      Covers zombie, creeper, skeleton, dragon, and player heads.
      static MaterialSetTag SPAWN_EGGS
      Covers all spawn egg items.
      static MaterialSetTag SPONGES
      Covers sponge and wet sponge.
      static MaterialSetTag STAINED_GLASS
      Covers all 16 colors of stained glass.
      static MaterialSetTag STAINED_GLASS_PANES
      Covers all 16 colors of stained glass panes.
      static MaterialSetTag STAINED_TERRACOTTA
      Covers the 16 colors of stained terracotta.
      static MaterialSetTag TERRACOTTA
      Covers terracotta along with the 16 stained variants.
      static MaterialSetTag TORCH  
      static MaterialSetTag TRAPDOORS
      Covers all 7 variants of trapdoors.

      Covers all 6 wood variants of fences.
